description: Cross-repo completion evidence for the lifecycle guard. record_completion / set_feature_status cannot complete an externally-owned (cross-repo) feature: verifyCompletionEvidence (server/lifecycle-guard.js) git-verifies commit_sha against the COMPOSE repo only, so a feature whose implementing commit lives in another repo (e.g. a stratum-owned STRAT-* feature tracked in compose's roadmap) fails with COMPLETION_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED even though it shipped + passed tests. Add an external-evidence path: accept external_repo/external_commit (verify in the named repo), or skip git-verify for externalPrefixes-matched features while still requiring attested tests + a provenance note. Surfaced by the STRAT-AGENT-INTERP canon backfill, which had to set status COMPLETE via direct feature.json edit because the guard path was unavailable. Owner: compose.
